query.text: I am a patient recently diagnosed with Breast Cancer, Stage II. I am looking for treatment experiences and doctor recommendations from others who have been through similar journeys.

retrieved_experiences.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Chemotherapy. Recovery took 174 days. Side effects included hot_flashes, weight_changes.
I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Chemotherapy. Recovery took 393 days. Side effects included nausea, hot_flashes.
I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Radiation. Recovery took 352 days. Side effects included hair_loss, nausea.
I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Surgery. Recovery took 208 days. Side effects included fatigue, hot_flashes.
I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Surgery. Recovery took 104 days. Side effects included neuropathy, nausea.
